overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following a character through Night City. The sequence transitions from a dark industrial underpass up a concrete stairwell into a neon-lit covered commercial street with futuristic vehicles and dense cyberpunk architecture, ending at a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian underpass with ventilation fans

agents.ego_description: following a group of pedestrians through the covered underpass toward the exit

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the stairwell exit

entered.detail: large green industrial exhaust fans mounted on concrete wall
colorful food vendor cart with umbrella near the wall
illuminated corporate sign reading KIROSHI 7 above the exit
massive concrete columns supporting the underpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial underpass with massive green ventilation fans lining the left wall. The camera follows a group of pedestrians walking toward a distant exit marked by a KIROSHI 7 sign, passing a street food cart along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell ascending to street level

events.description: entering darker enclosed stairwell from the underpass
approaching bright daylight at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs following a pedestrian in a pink skirt and green jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink skirt and green jacket ascending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow-edged steps ascending between walls
metal handrails lining both sides of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete stairwell transitioning from the dark underpass toward daylight. Following a character in a pink skirt, the lighting shifts from artificial to natural brightness as the stairs climb toward the street level exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial pedestrian street with neon advertising

events.description: exiting stairwell into covered urban street with neon billboards
futuristic vehicles driving past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered commercial street observing the neon signs and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic orange and red cars driving along the street

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying WET DREAM in pink neon text
metal truss roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
wall with large red bull graffiti mural
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a covered cyberpunk commercial street, the scene features prominent neon billboards including a large WET DREAM sign. The camera walks along the pedestrian pathway as futuristic vehicles pass on the adjacent road beneath an overhead metal walkway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection with crosswalk and angular architecture

events.description: turning right toward the street crosswalk
waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: turning right and approaching the crosswalk to cross the street

entered.detail: zebra crossing stripes on the tiled ground
tall pillar with traffic signals and directional signs
modern building with sharp angular black facade

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the end of the commercial street, approaching a crosswalk marked with zebra stripes. The character waits near a traffic control pillar as futuristic vehicles including a green van pass by, with angular modern architecture visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial underpass that ascends into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk commercial district. It begins by following pedestrians past massive green ventilation fans and a street food cart toward a distant KIROSHI 7 sign. As the camera climbs a concrete stairwell, the lighting shifts from artificial gloom to natural brightness, trailing a character in a pink skirt toward the street level. The scene then opens into a covered commercial thoroughfare filled with glowing billboards and a large WET DREAM sign, moving alongside futuristic vehicles beneath an overhead metal walkway. Finally, the camera turns right toward a zebra-striped crosswalk, where it pauses near a traffic control pillar as a green van passes against a backdrop of angular modern architecture.
